html:
Exclusive to:

The Cannonball is a item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in The Curse of Moon Quay update. It's crafted in the Seafaring Filter from two Cut Stone and one Gunpowder. Cannonballs can be loaded into a Cannon. A loaded Cannon deals 200 (120 area of effect) damage and can uproot Kelp and kill Ocean Fish, as well as defend against Pirate Raids.

The Cannonball crafting recipe can be obtained from a Blueprint given by the Queen of Moon Quay in exchange for Bananas if the player does not have any Accursed Trinkets.

Gallery

  • Cannonball Model
  • Cannonball texture that was found in the Don't Starve: Newhome beta files.
  • Cannonball texture that was found in the Don't Starve: Newhome beta files in air
  • Cannonball texture that was found in the Don't Starve: Newhome beta files flies
  • Cannonball texture that was found in the Don't Starve: Newhome beta files splash
  • Cannonball texture from The Curse of Moon Quay beta

“This will fit into a cannon perfectly.”
–Wilson
“Okay, but I still think fireballs would be better.”
–Willow
“Do not worry, Wolfgang will carry.”
–Wolfgang

–Wendy
“AMMUNITION ACQUIRED”
–WX-78
“A suitable projectile for a cannon.”
–Wickerbottom
“I sure wouldn't want one of these fired at my boat.”
–Woodie
“That looks heavy. Someone should load it into the cannon.”
–Maxwell
“Wöe to any föol who döth attack my ship!”
–Wigfrid
“Mr. Wolfgang says to lift with your legs, and we've got lots!”
–Webber
“I hope it won't be needed.”
–Warly
“Rock big, good for go boom”
–Wormwood
“Better load this in the cannon.”
–Winona
“Oh what a sinking feeling it brings!”
–Wortox
“Thought we not allowed to throw rocks?”
–Wurt
“That goes in the cannon.”
–Walter
“Pretty self-explanitory, really.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cannonball là một vật phẩm độc quyền của Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong bản cập nhật The Curse of Moon Quay. Nó được chế tạo trong Bộ Lọc Đi Biển từ hai Đá Cắt và một Thuốc Súng. Súng thần công có thể được nạp vào Súng thần công. Một khẩu Đại bác đã nạp đạn sẽ gây sát thương 200 (120 vùng hiệu ứng) và có thể nhổ bật Tảo bẹ và giết Cá Đại Dương, cũng như phòng thủ trước các cuộc Đột kích của Cướp biển.

The '''Cannonball''' is a [[item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[The Curse of Moon Quay]]'' update. It's crafted in the [[Seafaring Filter]] from two [[Cut Stone]] and one [[Gunpowder]]. Cannonballs can be loaded into a [[Cannon Kit|Cannon]]. A loaded [[Cannon Kit|Cannon]] deals 200 (120 area of effect) damage and can uproot [[Kelp Fronds|Kelp]] and kill [[Ocean Fishes|Ocean Fish]], as well as defend against [[Pirate Raid]]s.

The Cannonball crafting recipe can be obtained from a [[Blueprint]] given by the [[Queen of Moon Quay]] in exchange for [[Banana]]s if the player does not have any [[Accursed Trinket]]s.
